title: Harry's Blocks
description: This mod adds new ores, tools, blocks and wood!
body:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Warning!

This mod is in beta so not all the things are correct!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All the ores does not generate 

This will be in release in January 5th 2024

Before the ores generate we added recipes for all the ores!

We will update this mod every month!

MCreator does not support 1.21 yet. We will get it up to date soon as possible!

We will post more mods later in 2025.

Enderite is now complete on development.
